stories.title: The Knicks went all-in, and it paid off: How they ...
stories.summary: Here's how bold moves and a coaching change fueled the New York Knicks' improbable journey.

stories.title: Knicks finish off Cavs, make 1st Finals in 27 year...
stories.summary: The Knicks completed a sweep of the Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference finals to make the franchise's first NBA Finals since 1999.

stories.title: Mitchell, Harden clear on Cavs future, back Atkins...
stories.summary: In the wake of getting swept by the Knicks in the Eastern Conference finals, Donovan Mitchell reiterated his commitment to the Cavs, expressed confidence in his partnership with James Harden and said he'd like to see Cleveland's core remain together.

stories.title: Astros' Imai, 2 relievers combine to no-hit Ranger...
stories.summary: Astros right-hander Tatsuya Imai and relievers Steven Okert and Alimber Santa combined to throw a no-hitter in a 9-0 win over the Rangers on Monday night.

stories.title: Franco found criminally responsible, but no jail
stories.summary: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco was declared criminally responsible for the sexual and psychological abuse of a minor, but he will not serve a sentence for it, a judge ruled Monday in the Dominican Republic, with full sentencing slated for June 16.
